string.text:
The Desert Tech MDR (Micro Dynamic Rifle) is a family of gas operated, conventional rotary bolt bullpup semi-automatic rifles designed by Desert Tech in 2014. The rifle is compatible with Desert Tech caliber conversion kits that allow the rifle to change caliber. This provides a unique feature in which the rifle chassis can accept both intermediate cartridges and full-powered rifle cartridges on the same serial number platform.
 This particular rifle has been converted for 5.56x45, with full automatic fire and a tan polymer body.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] Scopes for Picatinny rail %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] NATO silencer
 %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] This weapon can be permanently upgraded with the Special Upgrade Pack.

The Desert Tech MDR (Micro Dynamic Rifle) is a family of gas operated, conventional rotary bolt bullpup semi-automatic rifles designed by Desert Tech in 2014. The rifle is compatible with Desert Tech caliber conversion kits that allow the rifle to change caliber. This provides a unique feature in which the rifle chassis can accept both intermediate cartridges and full-powered rifle cartridges on the same serial number platform.
 This particular rifle has been converted for 5.56x45, with full automatic fire and a tan polymer body.
 This weapon has been permanently upgraded with the Special Upgrade Pack.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] NATO silencer
 %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] Spectre 1-4x Scope with Deltapoint low profile sight on a 45 degree canted mount, and 60 round PMAG drum magazine

The Desert Tech MDR (Micro Dynamic Rifle) is a family of gas operated, conventional rotary bolt bullpup semi-automatic rifles designed by Desert Tech in 2014. The rifle is compatible with Desert Tech caliber conversion kits that allow the rifle to change caliber. This provides a unique feature in which the rifle chassis can accept both intermediate cartridges and full-powered rifle cartridges on the same serial number platform.
 This version is chambered in 7.62x51 with a black polymer body.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] Scopes for Picatinny rail %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] NATO silencer
 %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] This weapon can be permanently upgraded with the Special Upgrade Pack.

The Desert Tech MDR (Micro Dynamic Rifle) is a family of gas operated, conventional rotary bolt bullpup semi-automatic rifles designed by Desert Tech in 2014. The rifle is compatible with Desert Tech caliber conversion kits that allow the rifle to change caliber. This provides a unique feature in which the rifle chassis can accept both intermediate cartridges and full-powered rifle cartridges on the same serial number platform.
 This version is chambered in 7.62x51 with a black polymer body.
 This weapon has been permanently upgraded with the Special Upgrade Pack.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] NATO silencer
 %c[0,93,0,116] • %c[0,140,140,140] Spectre 1-4x Scope with Deltapoint low profile sight on a 45 degree canted mount, and 30 round extended magazine
